ham.subject: Out of Office: Will be back on Thursday
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office and will return on Thursday, 15th April. I will have limited access to email during this period.

If your matter is urgent, please contact Sarah Johnson at sarah.johnson@example.com or call the office line at 555‑123‑4567.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Alex

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Executive Gift Card Verification
